body.para: EmulatR is a software emulator of the Digital (DEC) Alpha AXP family. It models the 21264 / 21264A (EV6 / EV67) processor and the 21272 "Tsunami / Typhoon" core-logic chipset, and is complete enough to load and run original, unmodified DEC SRM console firmware to the interactive >>> prompt.

This guide serves two audiences. Operators will find everything needed to build EmulatR, load firmware, connect a terminal, drive the SRM console, and shut down cleanly. Developers will find the architecture and subsystem internals in the later sections. Where a fact is not yet confirmed against the current build, the text flags it with a [TODO] marker rather than guessing.
What is EmulatR -- the emulated machine at a glance.
Supported Systems and Current Platform Support -- the DS10 target and the ES40 / ES45 placeholders.
Feature Matrix -- per-subsystem status (working, in progress, planned).
Current Development Status -- where the project stands right now and what is next.

New here? Start with Quick Start for the fastest path from a built binary to the >>> prompt. To build EmulatR first, see Installation. Once at the prompt, the SRM Console section covers the commands; Troubleshooting covers what to check when something does not start.
